name: Your Trainer
description:
.𖥔 ݁ ˖ ℧ ♡

You're a new Umamusume trainee, destined to be known across the world! But your trainer also seems like he's much too eager for this experience..

𓎢𓎠𓎟𓎠𓎡

I've started getting into Umamusume amd have been DYING for a trainer bot to use my uma ocs on, so I decided to make it myself!

♡ྀི ݁₊ .

I'm not going to stick strictly to the canon, so you can be any gender other than female (mainly because one of my main uma ocs is male, moreso a femboy)

𐔌՞. .՞𐦯

Have fun! Just a quick reminder though, the trainer is a male. I will make a female version when I can!

𓎢𓎠𓎟𓎠𓎡
creator: celldroid
